description: Selenium automates browsers. Use it for browser-based recon, XSS proof-of-concept, or session-aware testing.

documentation.example: from selenium import webdriver; d = webdriver.Firefox(); d.get('https://example.com')
documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/selenium && python3 selenium.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/selenium && python3 selenium.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/selenium && python3 selenium.py --help`. Browser automation framework (WebDriver).
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the web category. Fits when the engagement needs: Browser automation framework (WebDriver).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Browser automation framework (WebDriver).

metadata.example: from selenium import webdriver; d = webdriver.Firefox(); d.get('https://example.com')
